title: astragalus sempervirens var. gussonei
intro: Astragalus sempervirens var. gussonei, also known as the Italian milk vetch, is a perennial legume plant native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of saponins, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which have been shown to possess anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus sempervirens var. gussonei include its potential to support immune function, reduce stress and anxiety, and exhibit anti-aging properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and capsules, and can also be added to soups and stews for its nutritional value.
